override.reason: BLOCK-1 (MCP health placeholder) is an architectural constraint, not implementation failure. swell-daemon intentionally has no MCP manager access (cross-crate dependency violation). Placeholder entry '_status' -> 'pending - MCP manager not yet wired into daemon' is self-documenting. BLOCK-2 and BLOCK-3 fully resolved.
override.contractGap: VAL-API-002 requires per-server MCP health - architecture prevents this without larger refactor. Documented as known limitation in daemon startup documentation.

nonBlockingIssues: MCP health placeholder only (architectural, not fixable without architectural change)
